title: 20:26 â August 18, 2020
body_text:
20:26 â August 18, 2020
FX Notes Plus Part Update
We updated the FX Notes Plus Part to reflect the new courier service, based on the secure site advisory,
FX Notes Plus: FedEx to Replace UPS as EBC's Shipping Carrier
. We also removed procedures related to AMEX traveler cheques. Per Exchange Bank of Canada (EBC) travelers cheques can no longer be processed on the system, effective immediately,
per this secure site advisory.
FedEx has temporarily restricted all shipping for foreign cash services to two-day delivery instead of the usual overnight delivery. Please see
FedEx Shipping for Foreign Cash Services Restricted to Two-Day Delivery Effective Immediately
for more information.
Currency Volume
FX Notes Plus Part
Section 1.4, Contacts, Websites, and Other Resources
We provided contact information for FedEx.
Chapter 7, Selling Foreign Currency and Drafts
We updated the shipping methods and timelines for delivery.
Section 11.4, Shipping Foreign Cheques
We updated shipping procedures and related images to reflect FedEx as the new courier. EBCâs FedEx account number is 310492418.
Section 11.5, Dishonoured and Returned Cheques or Lost Cheques
We added a sentence to clarify that collection items are only paid when they are completely cleared and will not come back as dishonored/returned.
Chapter 13, Shipping Foreign Currency or AMEX Travelers Cheques
We updated shipping procedures, supplies, and related images to reflect FedEx as the new courier.
